text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the 25th of December. We're at a pause in
Gold City's racing schedule, so I'm taking the
time to think about next year when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? Do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So listen, I need you to come meet me at this
location right away. Don't bring anything. Bye.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You do know what day it is today, right? Then
there's your answer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I've got a present for you, so...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want you to get changed downstairs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes me downstairs to a fitting room holding
tons of clothes. And before I know what's
happening...

text_block_list.name: Stylist
text_block_list.text: City! I dressed your trainer just as requested!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! That looks really good! I knew I was right to
ask you for help.

text_block_list.name: Makeup Artist
text_block_list.text:
No compliments on my makeup? I'd say I
enhanced your trainer's charm precisely how you
asked.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's perfect. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Makeup Artist
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's no problem at all! I'm just thrilled to be
spending the holiday with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Let's start the shoot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Everyone, thank you for taking a little time
out of your busy schedules to help me here! I
really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yup, it's my present to you—a professional photo
shoot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here is a top-tier artist. Even
professional models rarely get to work with this
kind of talent.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: They're going to make you look amazing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No wimping out. All right, let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Okay, Trainer, right this way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I find myself somehow roped into a photo
shoot of my very own.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, your expression is looking a bit stiff. Is
the light too harsh? Do you want it a bit dimmer?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...You're mega-nervous. Where's your usual
unbridled enthusiasm?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Sorry, can we have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Listen, Trainer. I'm right here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just keep your eyes on me, and you won't be
bothered by the surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What's there that could captivate you more than
me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's right—just focus on me. The professionals
will take care of the rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City smiles at me reassuringly. As I gaze at
her, I stop worrying about the voices around me
and the blinding lights, until...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Good work, Trainer! Take a quick break while we
review the photos.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The photo shoot ends before I know it! Seeing
myself in the monitor, I appear like an entirely
different person.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, of course it is! You're looking really good
too.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
I think you look your best when you're totally
focused on something. City must have realized
that too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Trainer. I think you got some good
shots in there.
choice_data_list:
I barely remember anything that happened after
the first half...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. I guess that means I did my job properly
too.
choice_data_list: Why did you do all this, though?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I tried to think of the best gift I could possibly
offer you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And this was what I came up with—to show you a
whole new side of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You taught me something similar before, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
When you're photographed by a professional,
you can discover what's appealing about
yourself—things you never knew. Isn't that
exciting?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So I asked some of my colleagues to get together.
Was it, uh... too much, you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was indeed very confused at first, but... I do feel
like I understand a part of myself I didn't know
before this shoot.
choice_data_list: Thank you for the best present ever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Mhm. I'm glad you enjoyed it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway, don't you have anything for me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I gave you the best present ever, then you have
to give me something better, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What should I ask for? Maybe a luxury bag? I've
been wanting to check out the latest pieces.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pfft, I'm just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... Like, how are you not used to this by
now? Oh, I can't!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the holiday night ticks away to the tune of
City's merry laughter.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are! Listen, we were thinking of
taking some shots of you two together.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Me and Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Everyone's so fired up to get both of you
dressed up for some shots with each other.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
I think it could make for some great photos, too.
You don't mind, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, if everyone says so, I guess we can give it a
try.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're all nervous again. Remember what I
said—you'll be fine if you just look at me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You've got the support of a top model!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash! Flash! Flash!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Now, put your hand here. That's good. Stay still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's one nervous moment after another, but we
make it through the shoot. And as Gold City
looks through the photos of us together, I can see
a smile on her face.
